'''[[Major/Legends|Major]] Stoghin Learz''' was a Kuati officer stationed aboard the ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' during its construction at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. When [[Shalla Nelprin]] (in the guise of [[Shalla Nelprin|Qatya Nassin]]) met a Kuati lieutenant in a corridor of the ship, she confused the man into thinking she was lost and looking for "Stoghi", using his confusion in attempting to find the major to overpower and kill him.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
